vocab.meaning: sự khao khát kiến thức không thể dập tắt
vocab.example: I chose philosophy because I have an unquenchable thirst for knowledge regarding the fundamental nature of existence.

vocab.meaning: động lực để hành động ngay lập tức
vocab.example: Seeing the impact of climate change was a spring to action for me to major in Environmental Science.

vocab.meaning: triển vọng nghề nghiệp hái ra tiền
vocab.example: I won't deny that the lucrative career prospects in Investment Banking were a significant factor in my decision.
My choice was driven by intrinsic motivation rather than external pressure from my parents.
I opted for International Relations to broaden my horizons and understand the complexities of global politics.

vocab.meaning: được thiết kế riêng cho (rất phù hợp)
vocab.example: With my love for storytelling, this creative writing course felt tailor-made for my personal ambitions.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi về tư duy/nhận thức
vocab.example: Studying Sociology caused a paradigm shift in how I perceive social structures and inequality.
I was drawn to Engineering because of the direct practical application of scientific theories to real-world problems.

vocab.meaning: đi đầu trong lĩnh vực gì
vocab.example: I wanted to be at the forefront of technological innovation, which led me to specialize in Artificial Intelligence.

vocab.meaning: sự linh hoạt trong nghề nghiệp
vocab.example: Business Administration offers great professional versatility, allowing me to pivot between different industries easily.
